Notice Of Hearing For Application And Application For Order Approving Payment Of Liquidators Administrative Expenses, Approving The Final Distribution Of Assets, And Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER INSURANCE COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Application For Order Approving Payment Of Liquidators Administrative Expenses, Approving The Final Distribution Of Assets, And Closing The Estate.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The insurance commissioner's application for order approving payment of liquidator's administrative expenses, approving the final distribution of assets and closing the estate is GRANTED. No opposition was filed.

The Court signs in open court the order submitted with the moving papers.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Heather Brae Hoesterey, Deputy Attorney General 415-510-3462 for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF INSURANCE COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Hearing For Verified Application For Court Approval Of Commutation And Mutual Release Agreement.

GRANT. No opposition filed and the application complies with the Insurance Code.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Ntc Of Hearing Of Verified Application And Verified Application Of Insurance Commissioner For Court Approval Of Reinsurance Commutation And Settlement Agreement And Release Agreements
Off Calendar May-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Lew, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 510.622.2225, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. PETITIONER INSURANCE COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFornia's Verified Application Of Insurance Commissioner For Court Approval Of Reinsurance Commutation And Settlement Agreement And Release Agreements is granted. The Court approves the reinsurance communtation and settlement agreement entered into by the Commissioner with reinsurer Munich Re and the related release agreements executed by four state guaranty association. The settlement is reasonable and no opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
